AboutOur TeamCurriculumEmployment PartnershipsSupport/Mentor

Stack skills, run joules

Stacks+Joules is on a mission to bridge the tech opportunity gap by offering a specialized curriculum in computer programming and wireless network management. We empower students to harness their creativity and strengths, regardless of prior experience, equipping them with valuable tech skills for the future.

↳Become a student
Our goal is to equip students with valuable tech skills, engaging their creativity and strengths, no matter their prior experience.
↳Employment partnerships
Graduates receive support through internships, job placement, and career guidance from industry professionals.
↳Make a donation
Your donation helps support students and furthers our nonprofit mission to provide valuable education and opportunities.

Our Mission

Stacks + Joules is a nonprofit workforce development program, training overlooked populations for jobs in Building Automation. Our mission is to give more people the chance to have careers that use technology for the common good. Through high quality experiential learning, we provide students and adult learners with the skills, real-world experience, and professional networks necessary for them to master the advanced technologies that affect the way we live and work.

↳ Student Success
89%
Complete Training
98%
Candidates Employed
28$
Average Pay Rate
76%
In Green Tech
↳ Curriculum
We have developed our practical curriculum through continuous collaboration with BELLEDS Technologies based at MIT and Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology in Terra Haute, Indiana.
Hands on learning
Students use wireless LED lighting and Python coding to learn building automation and create games, leading to a final light show exhibition.
Supportive classroom
Lots of Students use wireless LED lighting and Python coding to learn building automation and create games, leading to a final light show exhibition.
On-site experience
Facility tours led by industry professionals expose students to real work environments open opportunities to connect with potential employers and mentors.
Internship & Job Placement
Graduates are further supported with internship and job placement assistance, as well as future career development guidance and mentorship from building automation professionals.
Get The Newsletter

An every-so-often email recapping the efforts of the Stacks + Joules team.
